title: Textbox
main: This is a simple social media platform, in the style of twitter or Instagram, and implements the following functionality:
points: Custom homepage based on likes and follows.

title: Sherry
main: Sherry is a file sharing cloud storage platform in the style of google drive, and implements the following functionality:
points: Organize files using folders and tags
Share files with specific users, or make them public

title: Folding@RHS
main: Folding@RHS is a project where old, often broken, school computers are restored and have their computing power donated to medical science via the Folding@home project.
points: Created a master computer to monitoring of all systems at once.
Created Bash scripts to automate the installation of key software.

icons.alt: DNART screen fully lit up with lidar visible.

title: DNART
main: DNART is an Electrical Art project that displays the strands of insulin and scrolls based on movement detected by a lidar rangefinder.
points: Wrote and debugged code for Microbit to ensure smooth movement and radio communication.
Worked with both Microbit (for initial testing) and Arduino (for final version).
